summary: Retest after iter57 blank-page fix. Home now mounts cleanly with 0 console errors and 0 pageerrors. Theme menu, hint, Fall visuals, spin button colors (Fall/Light/Dark exact matches), Places deal single run, and Light/Dark regressions all pass. Found ONE persistence bug: Fall theme is NOT restored on reload (falls back to Dark) because useTheme.js `read()` only whitelists 'light'|'dark'.

ui_bugs.issue: Fall theme does not persist across reload. localStorage saves ff_theme='fall' correctly (setTheme accepts any value), but on next load read() only returns s if s === 'light' || s === 'dark', otherwise defaults to 'dark'. Result: after picking Fall + reload, dataset.ffTheme='dark' (verified: ff_theme='fall' in localStorage yet ffTheme=dark after reload). Light persists fine.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.js line 8, change `if (s === 'light' || s === 'dark') return s;` to include 'fall', e.g. `if (s === 'light' || s === 'dark' || s === 'fall') return s;` (also update useSyncExternalStore getServerSnapshot fallback if desired).
critical_code_review_comments: useTheme.js allowlist in read() must be kept in sync with supported themes; consider a THEMES const array to avoid drift.
setTheme has no allowlist validation — accepts arbitrary strings into localStorage. Recommend validating against allowed set.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (7/8 scenarios; only Fall reload persistence failing)

seed_data_creation: None. Cleared localStorage; set ff_guided_seen=1. Ran exactly ONE Places deal with ZIP 90210 as instructed.

verified_scenarios.theme_hint_flow: PASS (visible on fresh load, hidden after opening menu, not shown after reload with ff_theme_hint_seen=1)
verified_scenarios.places_deal_fall_shuffle_and_result: PASS (spin-result-card appeared with /api/places/photo?... restaurant image). Note: card-back query returned empty during shuffle sampling — likely because shuffle finished before query; result card image confirms flow works.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Only remaining defect is the Fall theme localStorage read allowlist in useTheme.js. Everything else confirmed working. When retesting, verify: (a) after picking Fall then reload, document.documentElement.dataset.ffTheme still equals 'fall'; (b) fall-scene remains rendered after reload.
